title: API Endpoint
scenario: Generate a simple API endpoint for a hypothetical API 'https://api.example.com/v1/users/'. The API should accept a GET request and return a list of users with their IDs and names.
constraints: Must be a standard API endpoint URL
Must include the HTTP method and endpoint path

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated API endpoint adheres to the constraints provided.
Check if the generated API endpoint is syntactically correct.
